title: Sysmon Lateral Movement via WinRM
description: Detects WinRM/PSRemoting connections (ports 5985/5986) from suspicious processes. Attackers use PowerShell Remoting for lateral movement and remote command execution.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Destination Port' = 5985 or 'Destination Port' = 5986) and Initiated = 'true') and (('Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\wsmprovhost.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\evil-winrm.exe')))
